figures.caption: Table 2: Short-term forecasting task on M4 (Part I). The prediction lengths are in [6, 48] and results are weighted averages from several datasets under different sample intervals. Bold values indicate the best results.

Table 3: Anomaly detection task. We report Precision, Recall, and F1-score (%) for each dataset, where bold values indicate the best F1-score. Anomaly Transformer∗ originally uses both Temporal Association and Reconstruction Error as a joint anomaly criterion; for fair comparison, only Reconstruction Error is used here.
Table 4: Model comparison in classification on UEA (Part II).
